overall.description: A third-person game engine sequence showing a character in medieval attire walking through a rocky canyon at dusk. The environment transitions from a narrow enclosed passage to a wide open valley with distant ruins and mountains under a purple twilight sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow rocky canyon passage with high walls

events.description: character passes a hanging lantern mounted on the right canyon wall
slight left turn following the winding canyon path

agents.ego_description: character walking steadily through the narrow canyon passage, passing a lit lantern on the wall

entered.detail: tall rocky cliff face forming the left side of the canyon
tall rocky cliff face forming the right side of the canyon
winding dirt and rock trail through the canyon floor
lit lantern mounted on the canyon wall providing warm light
tall thin rock formation visible in the distance ahead

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow canyon passage with high rock walls on both sides. A lit hanging lantern is passed on the right wall, casting warm light before disappearing behind. The path winds through the rocky terrain toward a distant spire visible through the canyon gap.

scene_state.functional_zone: widening canyon approach with distant formations

events.description: canyon walls recede significantly as the path opens toward the valley

agents.ego_description: continuing forward as the canyon gradually widens and distant structures become visible ahead

entered.detail: distant stone structures or settlement visible on the horizon
mountain silhouettes visible in the far distance

segments.scene_description: The canyon gradually widens as the character progresses, with the rock walls receding to the far sides. The distant rock spire grows larger and closer, while ancient ruins and mountain ranges become visible on the horizon ahead. The path remains a dirt trail through the rocky terrain.

scene_state.functional_zone: open valley with distant settlement ruins

events.description: approaching distant ruins with small lights visible in the settlement

agents.ego_description: walking across the open grassland toward the distant ruins under the darkening purple sky

entered.detail: grassy plains replacing the rocky canyon walls on the left
grassy plains replacing the rocky canyon walls on the right

segments.scene_description: The canyon opens completely into a wide valley with grass fields on both sides. The ancient ruins ahead grow larger and more detailed, with small lights visible within the settlement. The mountain range forms a dramatic backdrop under the purple twilight sky as the character continues toward the distant structures.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a narrow rocky canyon that gradually expands into a vast, open valley under a twilight sky. It begins with the character navigating a tight passage between high rock walls, passing a warm, lit hanging lantern that casts a glow across the winding dirt path. As the character progresses, the canyon walls recede to the sides, allowing a distant rock spire to grow larger while ancient ruins and mountain ranges emerge on the horizon. The scene then opens completely into a wide valley flanked by grassy fields, where the distant settlement becomes more detailed with small lights flickering within its structures. Finally, the camera continues toward these ruins against the dramatic backdrop of mountains beneath a deep purple sky.
